name: @dnd-notes/keycloak-jwt
description: Shared Keycloak JWT verification primitives for dnd-notes services

scripts.test:ci: c8 --all --src src --extension .ts --report-dir ../../reports/coverage/keycloak-jwt --reporter text-summary --reporter lcov --reporter json-summary --reporter cobertura node --import tsx --test --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter=junit --test-reporter-destination=../../reports/test-results/keycloak-jwt.junit.xml test/*.test.ts
